DP.499.0000:
Talk to that nice lady at the counter
and hand her your Pokémon.\f
She’ll heal your Pokémon to perfect
health in no time at all!
DP.499.0001:
Do you see that PC over there?
That fancy blue one?\f
If you’ve got Pokémon with you,
it’s free to use.
DP.499.0002:
The top floor of any Pokémon Center
is the Pokémon Communication Club.\f
There, you can have all sorts of fun
with your friends.
